description: Vertical designed poster built on a full-bleed photograph of a woman with silver hair, wearing a cream denim jacket and a beaded bracelet, leaning over a table to write on a note with a marker; a blurred American flag and other people are visible behind her. Overlaid large display text in golden-yellow and white reads 'You have the power' (with a smaller 'the' tucked in) followed by white text 'to make your community SAFER'. Bottom-left carries the DHS seal and 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement'; bottom-right the URL 'ICE.gov/287g'.
notable_text: You have the power to make your community SAFER ICE.gov/287g
